titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Henry Stephens Randall papers, 1845-1871.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Henry Stephens Randall Papers,1845-1871.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2008 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence pertaining to Randall's interest in sheep raising and breeding, the sale of sheep, especially to raisers in Texas, the difficulty of transporting sheep over long distances, diseases, pedigrees, stock improvement, and exhibitions; also letters to Randall concerning his books on the sheep industry, and responding to his plea for a New York Wool Growers Convention to be called in 1864; also, a report on common school libraries, Cortland County.

controlaccess.head: Subjects:
controlaccess.subject: Sheep industry--New York (State)
Wool industry--New York (State)
Sheep industry--Texas.
New York State Wool Growers Convention.
Education--New York (State)--Cortland County.

unittitle.extref: Link to a list of the correspondence from collection #1732 and former collection #2333. Includes names, dates, and subjects. PDF file.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Henry Stephens Randall papers, #1732. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
